# Costa Digital — Ecosistema Tech del Caribe

> Costa Digital is the technology ecosystem of the Colombian Caribbean, connecting
> communities, talent, startups, and capital. 3 years generating impact.
> Also known as Caribe Tech.

## About
- Technology ecosystem in the Colombian Caribbean (Barranquilla, Cartagena, Santa Marta)
- Connects community, education, startups, and capital
- +120 projects created in hackathons, +400 students, +5,000 event attendees
- Keywords: Caribe Tech, ecosistema tech Caribe, startups Caribe
- Website: https://costadigital.org

## Sections
- Talent Network: /talento — Developers, designers, and AI engineers from the Caribbean
- Communities: /comunidades — Tech communities in the ecosystem
- Programs: /programas — Education and training programs
- Blog: /blog — Technology news and ecosystem updates
- Allies: /aliados — Partner organizations
- Projects: /proyectos — Key ecosystem projects

## Events
- Tech Nights: Free event every 3rd Saturday of the month (https://www.codigoabierto.tech/eventos)
- Coworking Thursdays: Open HQ to work and learn together
- Barranqui-IA: AI hackathon — 650+ participants in 3 years (https://barranquiia.com)
- Tech Caribe Fest: Caribbean technology festival (https://techcaribe.co)

## Initiatives
- Ciudad Inmersiva: Startup studio (https://ciudadinmersiva.com)
- Caribe Ventures: Venture studio + pre-seed fund (https://caribe.ventures)
- Synergy: Founders & makers community (https://www.snrg.lat/inicio)
- Tech Centre: Technology education programs (https://techcentre.co)
- Shelv: Ecosystem map (https://shelv.io)

## API
- Blog posts: publicly accessible at /blog/{slug}
- Talent profiles: publicly accessible at /perfil/{slug}
